title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: OREGON CITY HIGH SCHOOL SBHC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 19761 S Beavercreek Road Room 145a Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Individuals with a income below 250% FPL. Out of network private insurance plans are not eligible for any specialty care referrals. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-7pm, Friday 8am to 5pm (503) 785-8772 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 785-8772 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Accepts most OHP plans and some private insurance. Minimum $20 fee due at time of medical appointment for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the Oregon City High School counseling wing, room 145A Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SCHOOL BASED HEALTH-CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON CITY HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
